5 ?70 0001001001 3

Constant
5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch
5 C 5n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 7
5 I 7 0001011000 3 mismatch
5 I 7n 1110100111 7 mismatch

Unary 0
5 I 0 0000010001 2 mismatch
5 I 0n 1111101110 8 mismatch

Binary 70
5 AND 70 0000010000 1 mismatch
5 AND 70n 1111101111 9 mismatch
5 OR 70 0001011001 4 mismatch
5 OR 70n 1110100110 6 mismatch
5 XOR 70 0001001001 3 match 1/1
all match XOR 70
5 XOR 70n 1110110110 7 mismatch
5 AND-NOT 70 0001001000 2 mismatch
5 AND-NOT 70n 1110110111 8 mismatch
5 OR-NOT 70 1111111110 9 mismatch
5 OR-NOT 70n 0000000001 1 mismatch

Matched
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4

6 I 1
7 I 2

Extending defaults
5 0001001001 3
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0001011000 partial 1111101110 8
left 8
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 0000010001 partial 1110100111 7
right 7
Choosing left
5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 I 5
4 I 6
5 XOR 70
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 00010001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 0
3 I 5 = 0
4 I 6 = 0
5 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
6 I 1 = 0
7 I 2 = 0

\boxed{01000100}
